title: The Legend of Zelda
description: Enter the Kingdom of Hyrule. This encompasses every main title and many spin-offs to create the ultimate Legend of Zelda Minecraft Resource Pack. Includes OptiFine/Fabric-equivalent support!
body:
[[​THOUGH I DO NOT CLAIM OWNERSHIP OF THE PROPERTIES REPRESENTED IN THIS RESOURCE PACK, I ASK THAT YOU DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE THIS RESOURCE PACK ON OTHER WEBSITES WITHOUT PERMISSION]]

![A block-built creation of the Master Sword in its pedestal. The Great Deku Tree is behind it, and "Link" stands ready to pull the sword. In white text, "The Legend of Zelda" is at the top-left of the image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02f0f473e5a337b6eaee09391d62bce0a13beea_0.webp)

# The Legend of Zelda for _Minecraft_ 1.21.3

The Legend of Zelda is a resource pack by me, Moldomré! It includes tons of retextured items, mobs, blocks, GUI, etc. all based on the legendary Nintendo franchise. There is **_at least one thing from every single main title of the series!_** Trade with the wandering trader Beedle, slay Bokoblins and Stalfos with the Master Sword, use a Hookshot to catch fish, or fight against the dragon Volvagia; this resource pack brings the entire world of the Legend of Zelda to you!

Main titles aren't the only thing that this pack is based on, other aspects of Zelda media have their own items in the pack! See below for the full list of other Zelda titles:

**Spin-Offs and More:**
- **_Satellaview:_** BS The Legend of Zelda
- **_CDI:_** The Faces of Evil
- **_CDI:_** The Wand of Gamelon
- **_CDI:_** Zelda's Adventure
- **_DS:_** Freshly-Picked Tingle's Rosy Rupeeland
- **_Wii:_** Link's Crossbow Training
- **_Wii U:_** Super Mario Maker (surprising, I know)
- **_Wii U, 3DS, & Switch:_** Hyrule Warriors
- **_Switch:_** Cadence of Hyrule
- **_Switch:_** Hyrule Warriors: Age of Calamity
- **_Switch:_** Super Smash Bros. Ultimate (surprising AGAIN)
- **_TV:_** The Legend of Zelda (TV Series by DIC Entertainment; absolutely SHOCKING)

I'm not the only one who's worked on this pack; my friend E_WOLFFE made contributions in the form of the original villager textures, tall grass, Iron Golem, the original versions of Zombies, the fire textures, and more.
E_WOLFFE actually has his own Itch IO page, so here's that if you want to check it out: [wolffius.itch.io](https://wolffius.itch.io/)

Also, Planet Minecraft and Modrinth are the only places that I, the creator, have published this resource pack. Others have redistributed it on more clickbaity sites without my permission. Let it be known, **_only download this pack from here or Planet Minecraft;_** please spread this information around, as one of the top Google results is a certain site with a "9" and "Minecraft" in its title.

Please enjoy, follow, and share!
